steps.title: Use the origin clue
steps.content: The sentence says African languages contributed to the Puerto Rican dialect, then gives Yoruba as an example. The blank needs a word for connecting a feature back to its source.

steps.title: Compare the words
steps.content: Choice A, announced, Choice B, offered, and Choice D, surrendered, do not express origin. Choice C, traced, means followed back to a source and fits the connection to Yoruba. The answer is C.
